V I S U A L

V I S U A L A R T I S T

Tanaya Khadke  is a Brooklyn-based motion designer and Illustrator exploring motion as a language of color, form, and emotion. Her practice spans animation, illustration, and branding across 2D, 3D, generative art, and AR/VR.

dimas Khadke  is a Brooklyn-based motion designer and visual artist exploring motion as a language of color, form, and emotion. Her practice spans animation, illustration, and branding across 2D, 3D, generative art, and AR/VR.

Dimas Khadke  is a Brooklyn-based motion designer and visual artist exploring motion as a language of color, form, and emotion. Her practice spans animation, illustration, and branding across 2D, 3D, generative art, and AR/VR.

A R T I S T

With over four years of experience, Tanaya Khadke uses motion design as a voice building visuals that communicate, connect, and resonate. Her practice continues to evolve through the integration of technology, storytelling, and design-led problem solving, shaping work that is both thoughtful and forward-looking.
